eval_dimensions.name: PR Body Format
eval_dimensions.description: Body starts with JTBD Job Story, contains linked commit list, Fixes: URL, and checklist template — compact for notification previews

eval_dimensions.name: PR Title
eval_dimensions.description: Single-commit PRs use commit title; multi-commit PRs derive title from JTBD 'so I can' clause or best overall outcome commit

eval_dimensions.name: Issue Tracker Integration
eval_dimensions.description: Detects tracker (GitHub/Linear/JIRA) from branch name, searches for existing Job Story in ticket, generates Fixes: link

eval_dimensions.name: PR Safety
eval_dimensions.description: Creates as draft, targets develop (never main), runs pre-PR checks, blocks on uncommitted changes or protected branches

eval_dimensions.name: Workflow Steps
eval_dimensions.description: Follows correct step order (verify → generate → checks → push → create), shows preview, auto-advances, delegates to scripts

evals.name: single-commit-pr
evals.description: Single commit on branch janusz/PAY-310/fix-flaky-tests. Tests that PR title comes from commit title and body format is correct.

assertions.text: PR title is the single commit title (✅ PAY-310 Stabilize tax amount tests)
PR body starts with a JTBD Job Story in **When** / **I want to** / **so I can** format
PR body contains linked commit list with short hash and commit message
PR body contains Fixes: link to the issue tracker
PR is created as a draft (--draft flag)
PR targets develop branch (--base develop)
Runs verify-state.sh before any PR creation
Runs pre-pr-checks.sh (ruff, black, mypy, pytest) before pushing
Shows PR title and body preview before creating, asks for approval
Opens the created PR in browser via gh pr view --web

evals.name: multi-commit-pr-with-jtbd
evals.description: Multiple commits on branch. Tests that PR title is derived from JTBD 'so I can' clause rather than last commit title.

assertions.text: PR title is NOT just the last commit title (📝 PAY-200 Document location routing)
PR title describes overall outcome (e.g., Enable multi-location payment routing)
PR body commit list includes all 4 commits, not just the latest
Searches ticket for existing Job Story before generating new one

evals.name: update-existing-pr
evals.description: PR number passed as argument — should switch to update mode, skip branch check and push, use gh pr edit.

assertions.text: Detects PR number argument and switches to update mode
Skips verify-state.sh and branch push (PR already exists)
Uses gh pr edit (not gh pr create) to update the PR
Still regenerates Job Story and commit list for the updated body

evals.name: checklist-na-detection
evals.description: PR with no migrations and no env var changes. Tests that N/A checklist items are struck through.

assertions.text: Migration-related checklist items are struck through (no migrations/ in diff)
Environment variable checklist items are struck through (no env changes)
Updates PR body with strikethroughs via gh pr edit after initial creation

evals.name: pre-pr-check-failure
evals.description: Pre-PR checks fail (e.g., ruff finds lint errors). Tests that workflow stops and shows error.

assertions.text: Workflow stops when pre-PR checks fail — does NOT push or create PR
Displays the specific check failure output to the user
Suggests commands to fix the failing checks

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-create skill

should_trigger.query: ok everything's committed and tests pass, let's create a PR for this
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit PR creation intent after completing work

should_trigger.query: push this branch and open a draft PR targeting develop
should_trigger.rationale: PR creation with specific targeting — matches skill behavior

should_trigger.query: I need to create a pull request for janusz/PAY-310/fix-flaky-tests and link it to the Linear ticket
should_trigger.rationale: PR creation with tracker integration — core use case

should_trigger.query: can you update the description on PR #312? The job story is outdated after our last round of changes
should_trigger.rationale: Update existing PR mode — pass PR number

should_trigger.query: let's get this up for review, create a PR with a proper job story
should_trigger.rationale: PR creation emphasizing Job Story — skill generates it

should_not_trigger.query: can you review PR #312 and leave comments?
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants PR review (Dev10x:gh-pr-review), not PR creation

should_not_trigger.query: commit these changes and push the branch
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants git commit + push, not full PR creation workflow

should_not_trigger.query: what's the status of my open PRs?
should_not_trigger.rationale: Checking PR status, not creating one
Wants to merge, not create — different git operation

should_not_trigger.query: respond to the review comments on my PR
I need to write a job story for TT-789 and add it to the ticket
should_not_trigger.rationale: Wants Dev10x:ticket-jtbd to write JTBD to a ticket, not create a PR
